name: Kite
description: Paper kites climbing a pale sky, tails snapping below them — every redraw re-trims the sails and sets new lines.

code.style: --sail: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --lean: @rand(-18deg, 18deg); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 22%; top: 4%; width: 56%; height: 62%; background: var(--sail); clip-path: polygon(50% 0%, @rand(80%, 98%) @rand(30%, 44%), 50% 100%, @rand(2%, 20%) @rand(30%, 44%)); transform: rotate(var(--lean)); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 49%; top: 64%; width: calc(26px / @Y); height: @rand(22%, 34%); border-radius: 99px; background: rgba(70, 70, 80, 0.55); transform-origin: 50% 0%; transform: rotate(@rand(-26deg, 14deg)); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
